programme.desc: Much to Tim's chagrin, Wilson would rather spend time with his niece than restore the Studebaker she gave him.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Jill (Patricia Richardson) is asked out on a date and realizes her 18-year marriage has lost some spark and romance. With Tim Allen.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Randy (Jonathan Taylor Thomas) questions God's existence, which prompts Tim (Tim Allen) to visit the Rev. Mike (guest star Dan Aykroyd).

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: The Taylors celebrate Thanksgiving with a Hollywood producer at a Detroit Lions football game. Guest stars: Rodney Dangerfield, Alex Rocco and Tom Poston.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim (Tim Allen) starts hanging out with his students when he gets a teaching job at the local college. With Patricia Richardson.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: After Brooke reveals the big news, Kelso begins to get excited about the prospect of having a baby; the INS visits to determine if Laurie and Fez's marriage is legit.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: After Eric loses his job, he finds himself up for the same waiting job as Kelso; Donna and Jackie send newly single Bob a box of fudge to cheer him up.

programme.title: That '70s Show

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim (Tim Allen) gets caught up in a Christmas decorating contest and uses enough lights to illuminate Michigan.

programme.desc: Brad announces his plans to marry a college woman, but Tim and Jill try to convince him he's too young.

programme.desc: Tim and Jill rent their second house to Al, who proves to be a difficult tenant; Randy and Brad buy the same shirt.

programme.desc: Jackie must come to terms with her mother becoming ill; Darlene's job hunt proves to be more difficult than anticipated.

programme.title: Last Man Standing

programme.title: Last Man Standing

programme.desc: Mike uses his vlog to track down a homeless man who has gone missing; Mandy helps a young mother from the woman's shelter.
